files.content: import { Avatar, AvatarBadge, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar' type Profile = { name: string avatar: string status: string } const profile: Profile = { name: 'Leo Grant', avatar: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=12', status: 'Available' } const getInitials = (name: string) => name .split(/\s+/) .map((word) => word.slice(0, 1)) .join('') const Avatar7 = () => { return ( {getInitials(profile.name)} {profile.status} ) } export default Avatar7
